tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$99.50 est. (last confirmed $95.42 TradingEconomics Apr 20, +3.7% Apr 21) as ceasefire expires Apr 22 with no deal and USS Spruance seizes Iranian Touska (Gulf of Oman, Apr 19) — first US kinetic boarding of Iranian vessel. Iran vows retaliation; Islamabad talks suspended. Apr 22 binary: tail scenario (50%) drives $130-170 spike; stress scenario (42%) stabilises $95-115. Rebuild Brent long to medium conviction; re-enter PTTEP and Medco on energy sector re-rating. Sapura options overlay active on 50% tail probability. Stop-loss: confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening (Brent sub-$88). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent ~$99.50 est. (+3.7% Apr 21) on Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry risk; ASEAN Energy Equities ~155 est. (+3.7%); ASEAN Banks ~170 est. (-2.9%). iTraxx Asia IG ~205bp (+15bp); ASEAN HY ~585bp (+20bp). Re-escalation fully reverses D47 de-escalation rally: rebuild ASEAN Energy long at current levels; reinstate ASEAN Banks underweight to 10-15% below benchmark. Apr 22 expiry without deal (50% tail probability) would drive further spread widening 220-240bp and energy re-rating to $130+ Brent. Conviction high on energy long; medium on bank underweight (tactical, not structural).

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Reopen on Hormuz Re-Closure and Touska Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~58.70 est. (+0.5% Apr 21) as Hormuz re-closes, Touska seized, ceasefire expires Apr 22. Re-open USD/PHP NDF short: Philippines bilateral Hormuz routing (bilateral deal in place) provides partial shield but active interdiction nullifies routing advantage. Tail scenario (50%): USD/PHP tests 60.50-61.00. Reinstate 3M NDF position with USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 strike as active hedge (not residual). Stop-loss: confirmed full Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration below 58.00. Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Rebuild on Re-Escalation
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~17,100 est. (+1.2% Apr 21); Indonesia 10Y ~7.28% est. (+8bp) as Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry drives risk-off re-escalation. ICP overshoot widens to ~$29.50/bbl at Brent ~$99.50 — fiscal pressure acute. Rebuild IDR short to half-size; USD Call/IDR Put 17,500 strike now near-the-money, upgrade to active hedge. Apr 22 tail (50%) points to 17,500-17,800 test. Stop-loss at USD/IDR 16,800 (confirmed Hormuz reopening). Conviction medium.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Re-add at 205bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~205bp est. (+15bp Apr 21); ASEAN HY ~585bp (+20bp) as Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry drives credit re-widening through prior re-add trigger of 190bp. Rebuild CDS protection to full-size; trim trigger at 190bp was activated — re-add executed. Retain Sapura / Hyflux paper short at elevated conviction (tail 50%). Apr 22 tail scenario targets iTraxx 230-260bp; stress scenario stabilises 200-220bp. Remove at confirmed deal + Hormuz reopening + spreads tightening below 175bp. Conviction high.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Rebuild on Hormuz Re-Closure
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM ~$20.30 est. (+3.0% Apr 21); TTF ~€46.50 est. (+6.2%) as Hormuz re-closed, Touska seized, ceasefire expires Apr 22. Rebuild JKM long to half-size — Asia LNG scarcity premium re-escalates with active interdiction and Ras Laffan restart not before late Aug 2026 (The National). TTF counter-leg: hold short as European spot premium compresses vs Asia on infrastructure divergence. Tail target $26-30 JKM on Apr 22 lapse. Stop at confirmed formal Hormuz reopening with P&I restoration. Conviction medium.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG widens to ~205bp (+15bp Apr 21) and ASEAN HY to ~585bp (+20bp) as Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry drives spreads back through the D49 peak. D47 refinancing window has closed. Execute any residual private placements immediately before Apr 22 expiry; if ceasefire lapses (50% tail), spreads target 230-260bp and window shuts entirely. Do not wait for spread normalisation.

Brent ~$99.50 est. and THB weakening to ~33.85 est. (Thailand 10Y ~2.33%) reduce the THB prefunding advantage vs Apr 17 window. PTTEP upstream EBITDA still strong at elevated oil; execute USD H2 2026 prefunding now before Apr 22 ceasefire expiry binary — tail scenario Brent $130-170 would widen USD spreads 30-50bp further. Gulf JV sanctions-compliance review remains urgent given Touska precedent.

iTraxx Asia IG ~205bp (+15bp) and USD/SGD ~1.2920 (+0.4%) after Touska seizure + ceasefire expiry. Working capital pressure re-escalates: Brent ~$99.50 and JKM ~$20.30 reverse Apr 17 input cost relief. Execute revolving-credit expansion immediately — Apr 22 tail scenario (50%) would widen spreads to 230bp+ and close the window. Maintain full USD hedging; increase hedge ratio if Brent above $100 confirmed.

ASEAN HY ~585bp (+20bp Apr 21) on Touska escalation; Brent ~$99.50 re-escalates desalination power cost trajectory. Hyflux's utility stress is acute. Execute private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring before Apr 22 expiry; tail scenario (50%) would push ASEAN HY to 620-650bp — restructuring terms would deteriorate materially. No window after Apr 22 if ceasefire lapses.
